Context

Within days of the contest organizers had confirmed intent.[1] A second reference to undefined source.[2] And a direct citation.[3] An ISBN template ref.[4] A fourth sfn without body link.[5]

  1. ↑ Roxburgh 2014, pp. 113–116.
  2. ↑ Nowhere 2020.
  3. ↑ Smith, John (2020). A Book.
  4. ↑ ISBN 978-0-306-40615-7
  5. ↑ Roxburgh 2014.

Bibliography

  1. Roxburgh, Gordon (2014). Songs for Europe. Telos Publishing. ISBN 978-1-84583-093-9.
